name: Huichuang Dark Walnut (Rift)
cut: Rift / quarter cut — straight parallel grain, alternating bands
finish: Satin ~10–14% — best calibrated in walnut range
bestSegments: Architects / Spec channel · Aspirational Professionals · Corporate
bestCities: Mumbai · Bengaluru · Pune · Hyderabad · Delhi NCR
topApplication: TV walls · Large accent walls · Wardrobes · Commercial interiors
keyStrength: Darkest J. nigra tone in catalog. Rift geometry + calibrated finish = spec-channel ready today.
keyWeakness: No heartwood-sapwood band. Tonal variation moderate.
priorityFix: Add heartwood-sapwood cream band — would push score to ~8.3

name: Huichuang Walnut (Italian, Knot)
cut: Flat cut — oval knot figure + flowing wave grain
bestSegments: Aspirational Professionals · Design Millennials · Heritage Buyers
bestCities: Mumbai · Bengaluru · Pune · Hyderabad · Delhi NCR
topApplication: TV walls · Bedroom headboard · Foyer · Home office
keyStrength: Knot figure adds depth and character no flat-grain walnut film can match.
keyWeakness: Slight red-warm tone bias. Short pattern repeat due to knot. Finish too high.
priorityFix: Cool tone 15% toward chocolate-brown + reduce finish to 10–14% satin

name: Huichuang Walnut (Clean Grain)
cut: Flat cut — flowing wave, no knot
bestCities: Mumbai · Bengaluru · Pune · Hyderabad · Delhi NCR
topApplication: TV walls · Large accent walls · Wardrobes · Bedroom headboard
keyStrength: Best finish calibration in walnut category. Longer repeat suits large-wall briefs.
keyWeakness: Less dramatic than NB010 — no knot figure. Heartwood-sapwood absent.
priorityFix: EIR audit under raking light + heartwood-sapwood band

name: Huichuang Walnut (Rich Dark)
cut: Flat cut — rich flowing wave, dark chocolate-brown
bestCities: Mumbai · Bengaluru · Pune · Hyderabad · Delhi NCR
topApplication: TV walls · Bedroom headboard · Large accent walls · Wardrobes
keyStrength: Richest dark tone in NB010 flat family. Strong tonal contrast across grain.
priorityFix: Reduce finish to 10–14% satin — highest single-step gain

name: Huichuang Walnut (Character Figure)
cut: Flat cut — flowing grain with focal figure intersection
bestSegments: Aspirational Professionals · Design Millennials · Heritage Buyers
bestCities: Mumbai · Bengaluru · Pune · Hyderabad · Delhi NCR
topApplication: Bedroom headboard · Feature accent wall · Foyer · TV wall
keyStrength: Grain convergence figure adds natural drama without a literal knot.
keyWeakness: Finish too high. Short repeat limits large continuous surfaces.
priorityFix: Reduce finish to 10–14% satin — urgent, this is too high for premium channel

name: Huichuang Walnut (Dark Rich)
bestCities: Mumbai · Bengaluru · Pune · Hyderabad · Delhi NCR
topApplication: TV walls · Bedroom headboard · Wardrobes · Home office
keyStrength: Darker tone than NB011 — better J. nigra accuracy. More convincing flowing grain.
keyWeakness: Heartwood-sapwood absent. Less dramatic than NB010 series.

name: ART DECOR Walnut
keyStrength: Highest demand species in India. Flowing wave grain convincing.
keyWeakness: Tone lighter than J. nigra benchmark. Short pattern repeat.
priorityFix: Open-pore matte variant + deepen/cool tone toward American walnut

name: Huichuang Walnut (Standard)
cut: Flat cut — straight-flowing grain, moderate contrast
bestSegments: Aspirational Professionals · Tier-2 Aspirants · Volume residential
bestCities: Mumbai · Bengaluru · Pune · Hyderabad · Delhi NCR · All Tier-2
topApplication: TV walls · Wardrobes · Bedroom · Home office
keyStrength: Volume walnut — correct tone register, broad application range, cost-efficient.
keyWeakness: Plain grain — no drama or character marks. Finish too high.

name: Aesthetic Teak Rift Cut
bestSegments: Heritage Buyers · Aspirational Professionals · Tier-2 Aspirants
bestCities: Chennai · Ahmedabad · Delhi NCR · Hyderabad · All Tier-2
topApplication: TV walls · Wardrobes · Bedroom · Pooja units
keyStrength: Rift cut avoids cathedral arch execution trap. Longest pattern repeat in teak category.
keyWeakness: Finish 5–8% too high for premium channel. No heartwood-sapwood contrast.
priorityFix: Reduce finish to 8–12% satin — single highest-impact change available

name: ART DECOR Oak
topApplication: Kitchen cabinets · Bedroom headboard · Home office
keyStrength: Best mimicry quality in batch. Finish perfectly calibrated for Japandi.
keyWeakness: Demand ceiling below walnut. EIR registration unconfirmed.
priorityFix: Confirm EIR under raking light — upgrade if not registered

name: Huichuang Oak (Flat Cut)
topApplication: Bedroom headboard · Kitchen cabinets · TV walls · Home office
keyStrength: Best-calibrated oak finish in catalog. Fine grain and clean cathedral arch.
keyWeakness: Flat cut reduces Japandi premium vs rift cut. EIR registration unconfirmed.
priorityFix: EIR audit under raking light — finish already correct, no reformulation needed

name: Huichuang Teak (Flat Cut, Rich)
cut: Flat cut — rich, confident parallel grain
bestSegments: Heritage Buyers · Aspirational Professionals · HNI residential
bestCities: Chennai · Ahmedabad · Delhi NCR · Hyderabad · Mumbai
topApplication: TV walls · Foyer · Bedroom · Pooja units · Wardrobes

keyWeakness: Finish still 2–5% too high. No heartwood-sapwood contrast.
priorityFix: Reduce finish to 8–10% satin — unlocks HNI spec channel

name: Huichuang Teak (Flat Cut, Character)

bestCities: Chennai · Ahmedabad · Delhi NCR · Hyderabad · All Tier-2
topApplication: TV walls · Bedroom · Pooja units · Wardrobes

keyWeakness: Finish too high. No heartwood-sapwood contrast.

name: Huichuang Teak (Rift Cut, Light)
cut: Rift cut — clean straight parallel grain, light honey-amber
bestSegments: Design Millennials · Aspirational Professionals · Contemporary buyers
topApplication: Bedroom headboard · TV wall · Home office · Wardrobes
keyStrength: Finest rift grain execution in teak series. Best finish calibration in teak family.
keyWeakness: Tone lighter than benchmark golden-amber teak — reads contemporary not traditional.
priorityFix: Deepen tone 15–20% toward golden-amber — closes 0.8 mimicry points

name: WiseWood Teak Flat Cut
bestSegments: Heritage Buyers · Aspirational Professionals · Tier-2 Aspirants
bestCities: Chennai · Ahmedabad · Delhi NCR · All Tier-2
topApplication: TV walls · Bedroom · Pooja units · Wardrobes
keyStrength: Highest demand score (8.8). Broadest cross-segment appeal in catalog.
keyWeakness: No heartwood-sapwood contrast. EIR unconfirmed. Mimicry limits the score.
priorityFix: Add sapwood band + EIR upgrade → could break 8.5

name: Huichuang Oak (Flat Cut, Light)
cut: Flat cut — near-straight grain, minimal cathedral arch
bestSegments: Design Millennials · Japandi-leaning buyers · Aspirational Professionals
topApplication: Bedroom headboard · Kitchen cabinets · Home office · TV wall
keyStrength: Most neutral, pattern-uniform oak in catalog. Ideal background surface.
keyWeakness: Flat cut limits Japandi premium. Finish slightly high for strict matte oak.
priorityFix: Reduce finish to 6–10% matte — closes gap with ART DECOR Oak

name: Huichuang Figured Hardwood
cut: Figured flat cut — strong horizontal curl/wave figure
finish: Satin ~12–16% — reduce to let figure breathe
bestSegments: Luxury HNI · Boutique Hospitality · Design-Forward Architects
topApplication: Feature accent panels · Boutique hotel walls · Showroom display · Headboard
keyStrength: Highest grain drama in catalog. Curl figure creates pseudo-chatoyance effect.
keyWeakness: Figured wood niche demand in India. Short repeat limits large surfaces.
priorityFix: Reduce finish to 8–12% satin — intensifies the curl figure drama

name: ART DECOR Iroko
keyStrength: Best grain pattern execution. Warm amber resonates with India's dominant taste.
keyWeakness: Semi-gloss finish misaligns with urban trend. No species brand pull.
priorityFix: Reformulate to satin 10–15% — minimal cost, unlocks premium channel

name: WiseWood Lacewood
keyStrength: Organic complex pattern. Satin finish appropriate.
keyWeakness: Chatoyance impossible in flat film. Low India demand. Species unknown to market.
priorityFix: None that changes the fundamental ceiling — wrong species for India
